name: FeatureEntitlementMiddleware allows entitled org
description: When the org is entitled to the feature, the middleware should call next and set the feature in context

steps.name: entitled org passes through with feature in context
ASSERT: Entitled feature should be set in context

parameters.name: Actual
parameters.value: *feature.Feature(&feature.Feature{CreatedAt:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), ID:[16]uint8{0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0}, Name:"test_feature", Plan:(*plan.Plan)(nil), PlanId:[16]uint8{0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0}, Quantity:0, UpdatedAt:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC)})

steps.name: ASSERT: Should not return error for entitled org
ASSERT: Next handler should be called
